project.name: BB Atlas
project.tagline: JSON-driven living-doc generator. One JSON file → one self-contained interactive HTML atlas — hash-routed drill-down, Monte Carlo schedule simulation, risk register, devlog. Reusable across project plans, constitutions, runbooks, knowledge bases.

now.title: CLI dispatcher
now.detail: bb-atlas generate / init / serve / validate. Default subcommand fires when first arg is a .json path.

now.title: Optional-fields fork
now.detail: All sections optional except project. Missing key → that section is skipped (not crashed).

now.title: Live-reload serve mode
now.detail: bb-atlas serve uses fs.watch + SSE to live-reload any open browser tab on JSON change. Zero deps.

now.title: Claude skill auto-discovery
now.detail: ~/.claude/skills/bb-atlas/ → symlink to this repo. SKILL.md surfaces on any session via trigger phrases ('living document', 'navigable dashboard', etc.).

next.title: Push to GitHub + publish to npm
next.detail: Currently local-only via npm link. gh repo create + git push, then npm publish (or scope as @captainrandom00/bb-atlas) to make installable for others.

next.title: Dedup the bb finance copy
next.detail: bb finance project still has the older standalone generator. Migrate it to bb-atlas CLI or programmatic import.

next.title: Watch glob patterns
next.detail: bb-atlas serve currently watches one file. Extend to watch templates/ and partials/ if/when those become a thing.

later.title: Themes
later.detail: Today: one dark 'mission control' palette. Could ship `--theme` flag with built-in light + alternative dark options, or `--theme path/to/theme.css` for overrides.

later.title: Partial templates / includes
later.detail: Split a large project.json into per-section JSON files referenced from the root. Useful for large constitutions / multi-team plans.

later.title: Schema documentation generation
later.detail: Auto-generate the schema reference in SKILL.md from a single source-of-truth schema file (JSON Schema or TypeScript types).

architecture.title: What's inside the box
architecture.summary: Single-file CLI dispatcher (bin/bb-atlas) routes to one of four lib/ modules. Each module is a single .js file with zero runtime deps. The generator core is split into a pure function (generateString) that returns HTML, plus a file-I/O wrapper (generate) for the common case. Schema validation runs against the same shape the generator consumes — single source of truth.

kindLabels.command: CLI subcommands · bin/bb-atlas dispatches to these
kindLabels.entity: Schema entities · top-level keys in project.json

architecture.dataModelLabel: JSON schema · top-level keys in project.json

modules.name: bb-atlas generate
modules.role: Emit a self-contained interactive HTML atlas. Implicit if first arg is a .json path: `bb-atlas project.json out.html`.
modules.detail: Resolves output path: explicit 2nd arg → D.output (relative to input dir) → './index.html' beside the input. Creates parent dirs as needed.

modules.name: bb-atlas init
modules.role: Scaffold a starter project.json + index.html in a target dir (default: cwd). Refuses to overwrite an existing project.json.

modules.name: bb-atlas serve
modules.role: Watch input.json with fs.watch, regenerate on every save, host at http://localhost:4321 (configurable), live-reload open tabs via SSE.
modules.detail: Debounces fs.watch by 80ms (editors emit multiple events per save). Injects a 5-line EventSource snippet into the served HTML for live-reload. Opens the default browser on boot unless --no-open.

modules.name: bb-atlas validate
modules.role: Lint a project.json against the schema without generating. Surfaces missing required fields + type mismatches. Exits 1 on errors.

modules.name: lib/generate.js
modules.role: Pure-function generator. Exports {generate, generateString}. The same code path serves the CLI, the serve loop, and any programmatic embedding.
modules.detail: generateString(D, dataPathHint?) takes parsed JSON, returns {html, viewCount}. generate({dataPath, outPath}) wraps it with file I/O. Script mode (`node lib/generate.js`) is kept for back-compat with the bb finance copy.

modules.name: lib/init.js
modules.role: Copies templates/starter.project.json into the target dir, then calls generate() to seed index.html alongside it.

modules.name: lib/serve.js
modules.role: fs.watch + http.createServer + SSE subscribers. Zero deps. Injects the EventSource snippet before </body> of every served response.

modules.name: lib/validate.js
modules.role: Recursive type check against the schema. Returns {errors, warnings} — errors fail the lint, warnings are advisory (e.g. 'simulation set without sprints — Monte Carlo will be skipped').

modules.name: starter.project.json
modules.role: Slim project.json shipped by `bb-atlas init`. Includes the 3 required-feeling sections (project, metrics, roadmap) + 1 devlog entry. Lets a new user see a working atlas on first run.

dataModel.relations: Brand lockup bolds last word of atlasBrand (or name)
Each card: {title, detail, tag, link?}; link = hash route
Each becomes #/sprint/<id> page; tasks have ac (acceptance criteria)
prob × delayWeeks feed the Monte Carlo if simulation set; risksLabel overrides section heading (e.g. 'GOTCHAS')
Auto-disabled if no sprints. P50/P80/P90 reported in-browser.

risks.name: fs.watch on macOS doesn't see editor atomic-saves reliably
risks.impact: Some editors (vim with :w) replace the file atomically, which can confuse fs.watch — change events stop firing.
risks.mitigation: If serve stops responding to saves, kill + restart. v1.1 candidate: switch to fs.watchFile (polling) or expose a --poll flag.

risks.name: innerHTML in the bb finance copy
risks.impact: The standalone bb finance generator still uses innerHTML for the sim widget updates — security-hook flagged when copying upstream into this repo.
risks.mitigation: This repo uses textContent + pre-rendered <b> markers (same render, safer). bb finance dedup sprint will fix theirs.

risks.name: No JSON Schema document
risks.impact: Schema lives in lib/validate.js + the SKILL.md table. Not a machine-readable JSON Schema (no draft-07 .json). IDE auto-complete works via TS for require/import, not the JSON file.
risks.mitigation: v1.1 candidate: emit schema.json from validate.js (or vice versa).

devlog.title: v1.0.0 — CLI dispatcher + skill extracted to standalone repo
devlog.body: Extracted from ~/.claude/skills/bb-atlas/ (inline directory) to ~/Development/byte-bridges-atlas/ (own git repo). bin/bb-atlas dispatcher routes to lib/{generate,init,serve,validate}.js. package.json bin entry → `npm link` puts bb-atlas in $PATH. Skill folder is now a symlink to this repo. Smoke-tested against bb finance baseline: byte-clean (59 lines whitespace + footer diff).

devlog.title: Optional-fields fork — sprints/simulation/pricing/risks/devlog/architecture/milestones now skippable
devlog.body: Forked from the bb finance v2 generator. Replaced unguarded .map()/.find() calls with Array.isArray() guards. Sim widget refactored to textContent (was innerHTML). New CSS chips for mod-kind values agent/hook/registry/plugin (constitutional/non-software use cases).

devlog.title: First non-project atlas — claudeworkflow constitution
devlog.body: Validation use case for the optional-fields fork. ~/claudeworkflow/atlas/constitution.json populated with 31 agents (as architecture.modules, kind: agent), 6 hooks (kind: hook), 4 registries (kind: registry), 7 gotchas (risks with risksLabel: 'GOTCHAS'), 9 constitutional change entries (devlog). Sprints/simulation/pricing all omitted. Renders cleanly at 44 views, 95 KB.
